title: Employer Group Directory — Searchable List of All Configured Employers
description: The system shall provide an Employer Group Management screen listing all configured employer groups. The directory shows employer name, FEIN, active plan year, status, and key metrics.

title: Create Employer Profile — Required Legal and Contact Information
description: Authorized administrators shall be able to create a new employer profile with required legal, operational, and contact information.

title: Employer Profile Details — Organization, Contacts, and Configuration Sections
description: The employer profile shall maintain complete organizational, contact, and configuration information.

title: Plan Year Configuration — Dates, Open Enrollment Window, and Validation
description: The administrator shall configure plan year start/end dates and open enrollment period. The system validates date logic: start < end, and open enrollment must precede plan year start.
validationRules: Open Enrollment Start < Open Enrollment End
Open Enrollment must occur before Plan Year Start

title: Plan Year Lifecycle States — Controls Enrollment Availability
description: Plan years shall follow a defined lifecycle. The current plan year state determines whether employees can enroll. Multiple plan years can coexist for rollover and historical data.

title: Payroll Frequency Configuration — Drives Premium Calculation Engine
description: The employer shall define its payroll frequency. This configuration feeds the Premium Calculation Engine to compute per-pay-period deductions.

title: Payroll Calendar — Configured Pay Dates for Accurate Deduction Calculations
description: The system should support a payroll calendar defining pay dates for the employer's plan year. This enables accurate per-pay-period deduction calculations and payroll transmission scheduling.

title: Product Linking — Select Which Benefit Products Are Available to the Employer
description: Administrators shall be able to select which benefit product types are available to the employer. The employer may then configure which products are offered for each plan year.

title: Employer Plan Configuration — Plans Linked to Employer and Plan Year
description: The system shall allow specific plans to be linked to an employer and plan year. This prevents globally configured plans from appearing in contexts where they do not apply.

title: Global Employer Context Switcher — Persistent Header with Employer and Plan Year
description: The global application header shall display the currently selected employer and plan year. Clicking the employer name opens a context switcher allowing authorized users to switch employers.
headerDisplay: Acme Benefits Admin ▼  |  2027 Plan Year  |  🔍 Search

title: Employer Context Persistence — All Screens Filter to Selected Employer + Plan Year
description: The selected employer and plan year context shall persist across all navigation within the session. All screens, API queries, reports, AI conversations, and workflows shall automatically use the active employer context.
architecturePrinciple: employerId + planYearId are mandatory context keys in all data model queries. This prevents data from multiple employers from being accidentally mixed.

title: Context Switch Confirmation — Warn on Unsaved Changes Before Switching Employer
description: If the user switches employer while editing unsaved data, the system shall warn them and offer to stay or discard and switch.
warningMessage: You have unsaved changes for Acme Corporation 2027 Plan Year. Switching to Globex Inc. will discard these changes.

title: Employer Dashboard — Benefits Overview with Key Metrics for Selected Employer
description: Each employer shall have a dashboard showing key benefits metrics for the current plan year. This is the entry point for the Executive Dashboard.

title: Employer Employee Count — Dynamic Headcount by Status
description: The system shall maintain employee counts by employer and employment status. Counts are dynamically calculated, not hardcoded.

title: Employer Eligibility Configuration — Waiting Period, Effective Date, and Thresholds
description: The employer shall be associated with eligibility policies that drive the Eligibility Engine. Eligibility configuration connects Employer Profile directly to Eligibility Rule processing.

demoEligibilityPolicy.coverageEffectiveRule: First of Month Following Waiting Period

title: Employer Payroll Configuration — System, Employee ID Field, and Deduction Code Format
description: The system shall configure payroll integration settings per employer including payroll system name, employee ID field mapping, deduction code format template, and transmission frequency.

title: Employer Carrier Configuration — Per-Benefit Carrier Assignments and Transmission Settings
description: The employer shall be associated with specific carriers for each benefit type. Carrier configuration connects directly to the Carrier Integration workspace.

title: Employer as Top-Level Context for Requirements Studio
description: The employer and plan year shall be the top-level context for the Requirements Studio. AI-generated requirements from uploaded Benefits Guide documents are associated with employer + plan year + product.

title: Employer Status Lifecycle — Controls Whether New Enrollment Activity Is Permitted
description: Employer profiles shall support a status lifecycle. An inactive employer prevents new enrollment activity but retains all historical data.
inactiveRule: INACTIVE status prevents new enrollment, life event, or configuration activity while preserving all historical records

title: Employer Configuration Audit Trail — All Configuration Changes Recorded
description: All employer configuration changes shall be recorded in the audit trail with actor, action, previous value, new value, effective date, and timestamp.

title: Employer RBAC — Users Only Access Assigned Employer Groups
description: Users shall only be able to access employer groups assigned to their role or user account. The context switcher shall only display employers the user is authorized to access.

title: AI Employer Configuration Assistant — Extract Employer Config from Benefits Guide
description: The AI assistant may help administrators configure an employer based on uploaded benefits documents. AI extracts configuration fields and presents them for admin review — it does not automatically publish configuration.

exampleInteraction.prompt: Set up Acme Corporation for the 2027 plan year based on the Benefits Guide.
